name: gcx-vector-protocol
description: The Vector Protocol: A Zero-Context Orchestrator for Gemini CLI. Leverages subagent swarms and fractal file systems for autonomous, long-running task execution.

commands.description: Strategy Orchestrator. Iteratively develops a tactical roadmap via a dynamic evolution protocol.
Execution Orchestrator. Autonomously implements and verifies the roadmap via a dynamic, parallel execution loop.

skills.name: vector
skills.description: Procedural engine for the Vector Protocol commands (`/vector:plan`, `/vector:work`). Activates the 'Zero-Context Orchestrator' and autonomous verification loops.
